seo.title: Building FastAPI project architecture with FastAPI and Py...
seo.description: A step-by-step implementation guide for FastAPI project architecture with FastAPI and Pydantic.

content.intro: This guide provides a structured approach to building scalable FastAPI applications with async database integration, LLM streaming, and production deployment. Focuses on architecture decisions and common pitfalls for real-world implementation.

steps.title: Project Structure for Scalability
steps.explanation: Create a modular structure with separate modules for routers, models, services, and dependencies. Use FastAPI's dependency injection system to decouple components.

code.content:
app/main.py
from fastapi import FastAPI
from app.routers import items

app = FastAPI()
app.include_router(items.router)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)

steps.title: Async Database Configuration
steps.explanation: Set up SQLAlchemy with async drivers (asyncpg) and connection pooling. Use async sessionmaker for database operations.

code.content:
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import create_async_engine, AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker

engine = create_async_engine("postgresql+asyncpg://user:password@localhost/dbname")
AsyncSessionLocal = sessionmaker(engine, class_=AsyncSession, expire_on_commit=False)

steps.title: Deployment with Docker and Reverse Proxy
steps.explanation: Create a Dockerfile with Uvicorn and Gunicorn for production. Configure Nginx or Traefik as reverse proxy with WebSocket support.

code.content:
FROM python:3.10
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt requirements.txt
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

steps.title: LLM Streaming Endpoint Implementation
steps.explanation: Implement a streaming route using Server-Sent Events (SSE) with proper backpressure handling. Use Redis for request tracking if needed.

steps.title: JWT-Based Authentication Setup
steps.explanation: Implement JWT authentication with Pydantic models for credentials. Create a dependency to verify tokens and extract user information.

content.conclusion: This implementation guide addresses core challenges in FastAPI development through concrete architecture decisions. Validate each component with pytest and monitor performance in production using metrics collection.
